CustomField.formula:
IF(AND(
Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000LLwRj", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000LLwRP", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000mohxj", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000LKqIJ", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0J1N00001hysKY", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0J1N00001a7UtA", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0J1N00001f9qcj", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0J1N00001fB67S", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000LLFu9", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V5xlz", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V61VE", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V61aO", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V61t6", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V62Lv", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V62TE", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V66Ed", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0J3m00001ibfH2", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0J1N00001gCHdA", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0J3m00001icNzM",
TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Lottery_Number__c"), "Lottery number should be Lottery_Number__c.", "Good"
)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: For properties with non CGP&H lottery numbers, make sure to outreach as follows before moving to the next listing stage: 1. Non CGP&H Lottery Numbers 2. CGP&H Lottery Numbers 3. Interest Date
CustomField.label: Lottery Number Check 01
